attractions.name: Brindavan Gardens
attractions.description: A beautifully lit terraced garden — ideal for a gentle evening walk and a relaxing start to the trip.

attractions.name: Mysore Palace (Amba Vilas Palace)
attractions.description: A magnificent Indo-Saracenic palace with ornate halls, royal durbars, intricate ceilings and historical artefacts. The morning light is ideal for photographs.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Mr. Vincent Rangel_ All Inclusive Guide-Mysore.pdf

attractions.name: Chamundi Hill & Chamundeshwari Temple
attractions.description: Enjoy sweeping city views and visit the revered Chamundeshwari Temple. Avoid peak noon hours for comfort.
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide - Coorg, Kabini, Mysore - Sandhya.pdf

attractions.name: Chamundi Hills & Temple
attractions.description: Sacred hilltop with Chamundeshwari Temple and panoramic views of Mysore city
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Mr. Vincent Rangel_ All Inclusive Guide-Mysore.pdf

attractions.name: St. Philomena's Church
attractions.description: Neo-Gothic masterpiece inspired by Cologne Cathedral with stained glass windows and twin spires
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Mr. Vincent Rangel_ All Inclusive Guide-Mysore.pdf

attractions.name: Jaganmohan Palace & Art Gallery
attractions.description: Palace housing impressive collection of paintings including works by Raja Ravi Varma
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Mr. Vincent Rangel_ All Inclusive Guide-Mysore.pdf

attractions.name: Devaraja Market
attractions.description: Vibrant local market with spices, sandalwood, silk, and traditional sweets

attractions.name: Nandi Statue
